full_text: Arshdeep Singh to Rossouw, Lbw!! What a review! Full marks for Karthik and Rohit. This is a massive wicket. The centurion from the previous game has been sent back for a duck. This is excellent bowling from Arshdeep. The first ball was an outswinger and this is a booming inswinger, Rossouw attempts to drive without knowing which way the ball is swinging, gets beaten on the inside edge and is struck in-line with the stumps. Ball-tracking has it to be crashing into the top of middle-stump.
